title: Mom Realizes Cops Found Her Sick Photos of 4-Year-Old

beats.description: Cold open montage of interrogation soundbites highlighting bizarre fetishes and the core crime.
Narrator provides context on the cyber tip, introduces suspects, and shows bodycam arrest at Safeway.
Transport to PD, Miranda rights administration, disability claims, and initial background gathering.
Deep dive into ABDL/kinks and online platforms as suspects establish boundaries and claim consensual adult play.
Detectives pivot to the daughter, hint at the cyber tip, and face initial denials and deflection.
Detective confirms seeing the explicit photo, reveals dog abuse evidence, and calls an interrogation break.
Lissa's emotional breakdown and confession to sending explicit images of her daughter to an online contact.
John confronted with confession; displays disturbing rationalizations and loss of protective stance.
Interview wrap-up, CPS custody announcement, and John's reluctant statement certification.
Jail calls, relationship fallout, legal updates, and final narrator summary of charges and foster care status.
